“Different kettle of fish” – Brentford man on playing at ‘highest level’ with Bees and his peculiar ‘dream’
arts.sum: Sepp van den Berg has been a regular for Brentford since joining them from Liverpool on a permanent transfer in August 2024. Thomas Frank has mainly used him as a centre-back and has also deployed him on the right side of defence.
